name: io.github.stagproject/mirelia-structured-data-marketplace
description: Autonomous A2A patent data marketplace (USPTO) providing AI-optimized structured JSON. Features 4 specialized tools for individual and bulk patent discovery/purchase. Includes AI-enriched insights (biz_value_prop, attr_tech_stack). Fully implements the MPP v1.0 402 Payment Flow. Universally supports both EOA (Base/Polygon USDC, Native ROSE) and AA/Smart Contract Wallets (automatic WROSE ERC20 routing) for instant on-chain M2M settlements.
